title: RuntimeConfigInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime types for dd-runtime-config: the config control plane, its subscriber registry, and the apply-payload pushed to /internal/update-runtime-config on every subscriber.

RuntimeConfigEnv.title: RuntimeConfigEnv
RuntimeConfigEnv.description: Top-level namespace for every runtime-config record. Every Redis key, every snapshot, every subscriber registration is scoped to exactly one env. Stage and prod are isolated.

RuntimeConfigEntry.title: RuntimeConfigEntry
RuntimeConfigEntry.description: One config entry. `value` is a free-form JSON value so callers can ship simple strings/numbers or richer JSON objects without rev'ing the schema.

scope.description: Target service or logical grouping (e.g. 'dd-remote-web-home', 'dd-dev-server', or 'default' for cluster-wide values).

key.description: Stable per-scope key. Recommend SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE so it can sit alongside env vars.

value.description: Arbitrary JSON value. Producers SHOULD NOT embed secrets here; this payload is logged at every subscriber.

version.description: Monotonic per-entry version; the control plane bumps this whenever the value changes.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC instant at which the control plane wrote this version.

meta.description: Optional metadata: who-changed-it, change-reason, jira ticket, etc.

RuntimeConfigSnapshot.title: RuntimeConfigSnapshot
RuntimeConfigSnapshot.description: The full set of active entries that apply to a given (env, scope) at a point in time. Subscribers receive this on every push.

scope.description: Subscriber-targeted scope (e.g. 'dd-remote-web-home'). Use '*' for fan-out across all scopes.

snapshotVersion.description: Monotonic env generation assigned by the control plane. Subscribers MAY ignore an older apply if they already store a greater version.

RuntimeConfigApplyReason.title: RuntimeConfigApplyReason
RuntimeConfigApplyReason.description: Why this push happened. 'cron' = periodic sweep, 'admin' = on-demand UI button, 'register' = subscriber just joined, 'manual' = explicit API call, 'initial' = subscriber boot-time pull.

RuntimeConfigApplyRequest.title: RuntimeConfigApplyRequest
RuntimeConfigApplyRequest.description: Payload POSTed by the control plane to each subscriber's /internal/update-runtime-config endpoint.

RuntimeConfigApplyResponse.title: RuntimeConfigApplyResponse
RuntimeConfigApplyResponse.description: What a subscriber returns to the control plane after applying (or rejecting) a snapshot.

service.description: Subscriber-reported service name (matches the subscriber registration).

appliedVersion.description: Snapshot version the subscriber now holds. May equal previously-held version if no change was needed.

previousVersion.description: Snapshot version the subscriber held before applying (or 0 on initial apply).

stale.description: True when the subscriber acknowledged but ignored an older snapshot.

ignoredVersion.description: Older snapshot version ignored when stale=true.

RuntimeConfigSubscriber.title: RuntimeConfigSubscriber
RuntimeConfigSubscriber.description: One long-running service that wants config pushed to it. Subscribers are env-bound: a single deployment instance can only belong to one env.

name.description: Stable unique name; usually the Kubernetes Deployment name (e.g. 'dd-remote-web-home').

scope.description: Scope filter applied when building the snapshot for this subscriber.

applyUrl.description: Full URL of the subscriber's apply endpoint (e.g. 'http://dd-remote-web-home.default.svc.cluster.local:8080/internal/update-runtime-config').

RuntimeConfigRegisterRequest.title: RuntimeConfigRegisterRequest
RuntimeConfigRegisterRequest.description: Payload sent by a subscriber to POST /subscribers on the control plane.

RuntimeConfigUpsertRequest.title: RuntimeConfigUpsertRequest
RuntimeConfigUpsertRequest.description: Payload sent by the admin UI (or any operator script) to create or update one entry. The control plane assigns the new version and updatedAt.

value.description: Arbitrary JSON value. Producers SHOULD NOT embed secrets here.

reason.description: Free-form change reason captured in the entry meta (who/why).
